title: meibomia sequax
intro: Meibomia sequax, also known as the butterfly pea, is a flowering plant native to tropical Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Meibomia sequax include reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and lowering blood pressure. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infused in hot water to utilize its medicinal properties, with some herbal preparations also using it in combination with other plants for enhanced benefits.
